summary_en: 2,500,000 shares (3.59% of shares outstanding) authorized to acquire for up to ¥2.0B via open-market purchases on Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 15 to November 30, 2026. Stated purpose: enhanced shareholder returns and flexible capital deployment for M&A and strategic alliances.
title_en: Notice of determination regarding treasury share acquisition matters (acquisition of treasury shares based on Articles of Incorporation provisions under Company Law Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief: CHANGE Holdings resolved at its board meeting on May 14, 2026 to authorize treasury share acquisition under Company Law Article 156 (as applied via Article 165(3)). The company will acquire up to 2,500,000 ordinary shares (3.59% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥2.0 billion through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 15 to November 30, 2026. The board stated the acquisition aims to enhance shareholder returns and to secure flexibility for future M&A transactions and strategic alliances. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 4,273,415 treasury shares against 69,578,947 shares outstanding.
